title: Grant
description: Grant ranks to players easily and simply.
body:
# Grant Grant is a plugin to easily grant ranks to players with expiry. ## Setup Grant provides two example ranks out of the box, but for further setup you can modify the `config.toml` file within the Grant folder. Example: ```toml [ranks.vip] displayName = "VIP" displayItem = "minecraft:green_wool" durations = ["1h", "6h", "12h", "24h", "forever"] ``` ### Explanation The name after the dot (ranks.vip) is called a key, and this should be identical to the groups name within LuckPerms. Below you will find more information on the particular options: Display Item | The display item is the item it will display in the grant GUI, I suggest making them unique so you can easily differentiate ranks.
Durations | A list of durations you would like this rank to have, a maximum of six is allowed. Supports hours (h), days (d), weeks (w) and months (m), as well as forever. You can create an infinite number of ranks for your Grant GUI.
